creator: draco@marino.st
text:
On 6/18/2013 11:19, Kubilay Kocak wrote:
> 1.1.33 exists in the archive, which is referenced in MASTER_SITES [1]

I don't know why you are referencing version 1.1.33

I see that py-flex was updated on June 7 to version 1.1.28.
The error reported was based on the previous version of 1.0.3273

Regardless that 1.1.33 is seemingly meaningless, the PR is not valid 
because of the recent update to the available 1.1.28.  Please feel free 
to close it -- Sorry, I missed the recent update occurred.

John
